questions.content: What is the main thing Julia feels she has gained from her experience in retail?
options: A better understanding of customer attitudes
B improved ability to predict fashion trends
C more skill in setting priorities in her work

questions.content: Why is Julia interested in doing the postgraduate course?
options: A it will enable her to develop new types of technology
B it will allow her to specialize in a design area of her choice
C it will provide managerial training focusing on her needs

questions.content: What would Julia like to do after she has completed the postgraduate course?
options: C stay in an academic environment

The nature of laughter
• Laughter is a {{BLANK}} process – involves movement and sound

Reasons for laughter

• May have begun as sign of {{BLANK}} after a dangerous situation

Benefits of laughter
• Safe method for the {{BLANK}} of emotions such as anger and sadness
• Provides good aerobic exercise
• Leads to drop in levels of stress-related {{BLANK}}
• Improved the {{BLANK}}
• Can stop {{BLANK}} and improve sleep
